analysis.summary: Tesla shares suffered their steepest decline of 2026 following disappointing Q1 delivery results. The stock fell to $387.37, its lowest level since November 2025, marking a 20% decline year-to-date.
keyPoints: Disappointing Q1 2026 delivery numbers triggered selloff
Still up 42.58% over past 12 months (long-term positive)

news.title: Tesla's stock suffers steepest drop of 2026 on disappointing deliveries report
news.summary: Q1 deliveries fell short of expectations, triggering a significant stock decline.
